mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department_info ( dept_name, parent_dept_id, manager_employee_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{deptName}, #{parentDeptId}, #{managerEmployeeId}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT dept_id, dept_name, parent_dept_id, manager_employee_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM department_info WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND status != 'deleted'

SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.parent_dept_id, d.manager_employee_id, d.status, d.created_at, d.updated_at, pd.dept_name AS parent_dept_name, e.name AS manager_name FROM department_info d LEFT JOIN department_info pd ON d.parent_dept_id = pd.dept_id LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON d.manager_employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE d.status != 'deleted' ORDER BY d.dept_id ASC

SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.parent_dept_id, d.manager_employee_id, d.status, d.created_at, d.updated_at, pd.dept_name AS parent_dept_name, e.name AS manager_name FROM department_info d LEFT JOIN department_info pd ON d.parent_dept_id = pd.dept_id LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON d.manager_employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.status != 'deleted'

SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.parent_dept_id, d.manager_employee_id, d.status, e.name AS manager_name FROM department_info d LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON d.manager_employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE d.status != 'deleted' ORDER BY d.dept_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department_info WHERE parent_dept_id = #{parentDeptId} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.employee_id) FROM assignment_info a WHERE a.dept_id = #{deptId} AND a.status = 'active'

SELECT d.dept_id AS deptId, d.dept_name AS deptName, d.parent_dept_id AS parentDeptId, pd.dept_name AS parentDeptName, COALESCE(emp_count.employee_count, 0) AS employeeCount, e.name AS managerName FROM department_info d LEFT JOIN department_info pd ON d.parent_dept_id = pd.dept_id LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON d.manager_employee_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.dept_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.employee_id) AS employee_count FROM assignment_info a INNER JOIN employee_info emp ON a.employee_id = emp.employee_id WHERE a.is_primary = true AND a.status = 'active' AND emp.status = 'active' GROUP BY a.dept_id ) emp_count ON d.dept_id = emp_count.dept_id WHERE d.status != 'deleted' ORDER BY d.dept_id ASC
